title: FAMILY MEDICINE - 211info
text: SANTIAM MEDICAL ASSOCIATES FAMILY MEDICINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides adult wellness and preventive care along with pediatric care and supports acute and chronic health management. 1401 N 10th Avenue Suite 100 Stayton, OR 97383 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (503) 769-6386 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 769-6386 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: OHP and most insurance accepted. Payment plan and financial assistance may be available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable AREA SERVED: Marion County Services: Community Clinics Family and Community Medicine Pediatrics If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SANTIAM MEDICAL ASSOCIATES
